templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum. A short rider that attaches to a parent agreement (e.g. CSA or Software License Agreement) and adds terms covering AI features, model training, and customer data usage.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement. HIPAA-required terms between a covered entity and a business associate that creates, receives, maintains, or transmits Protected Health Information.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement. Full standard terms for the sale and purchase of cloud software and SaaS products, designed to be signed via a separate Cover Page that incorporates these terms by reference.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement. GDPR-aligned terms governing the processing of personal data by a processor on behalf of a controller, typically attached to a primary services agreement.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement. Terms for an early-stage vendor and a customer who collaborate on the design and iteration of a not-yet-generally-available product.

templates.name: Mutual NDA — Cover Page
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA Cover Page. The fillable signature page that incorporates the Mutual NDA Standard Terms by reference; the two files together form an executed Mutual NDA.

templates.name: Mutual NDA — Standard Terms
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA Standard Terms. The reusable standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement between two parties exchanging confidential information; used together with the Mutual NDA Cover Page.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement. Terms for commercial partnerships such as referral, reseller, or channel arrangements, covering scope of partnership activities, fees, and partner obligations.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement. A short-term trial or evaluation agreement that lets a prospective customer test a product before committing to a longer-term deal such as a CSA or Software License Agreement.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement. Terms for the delivery of professional services (e.g. consulting, implementation, or integration work) under Statements of Work.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement. Uptime, response-time, and remedy terms designed to be used together with the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement. Terms for the licensing of on-premise or downloadable software, including order-form-driven term, scope, and payment provisions.
